unit.note: Full server vitest suite (1 pre-existing skip). Mission-context slice: 33 files / 391 tests.

integration.note: Mission-context route + resolver exercised through the real Hono request pipeline (app.request) — HTTP contract proven byte-identical across the async refactor.

e2e.note: F0.5 web smoke (core surfaces) against the modified server on an isolated stack. The embedded-terminal WebSocket-ready smoke was excluded (--grep-invert=WebSocket): it exercises node-pty/terminal, which this diff does not touch, and it is a known isolated-stack pty artifact.

behaviors.behavior: Async GitRunner is awaited — a Promise-returning git double resolves correctly through the whole chain
behaviors.evidence: worktree-roots.cache.test.ts 'awaits an ASYNC git runner' PASSED + merge-check.test.ts real-repo cases run through async execFile

behaviors.behavior: Sync git doubles still satisfy the widened GitRunner type (no injection-site churn)
behaviors.evidence: full mission-context suite compiles under `(args,cwd)=>string|Promise<string>` and is green (33 files / 391)

behaviors.behavior: readAllowedRootsCached spawns git ONCE within the TTL (no per-poll spawn)
behaviors.evidence: worktree-roots.cache.test.ts 'spawns git ONCE within the TTL' PASSED (calls===1 across three polls)

behaviors.behavior: readAllowedRootsCached re-spawns after the TTL expires
behaviors.evidence: worktree-roots.cache.test.ts 're-spawns once the TTL expires' PASSED (calls===2)

behaviors.behavior: readAllowedRootsCached dedups concurrent in-flight callers (caches the promise)
behaviors.evidence: worktree-roots.cache.test.ts same-promise identity (expect(b).toBe(a)) with a single spawn

behaviors.behavior: checkSquashMerged never regresses a terminal `merged` under the async cache race
behaviors.evidence: merge-check.race.test.ts 'a racing `pending` never regresses…' PASSED; verified RED when the guard is neutralized

behaviors.behavior: findWorkCompleted serves the cached index without re-projecting an unchanged log
behaviors.evidence: iterate-record.test.ts 'serves the run from the cached index…' PASSED (same RunProjection object identity)

behaviors.behavior: findWorkCompleted does NOT re-read the log while its (mtime,size) fingerprint is unchanged
behaviors.evidence: iterate-record.test.ts 'does NOT re-read the log while its (mtime,size) fingerprint is unchanged' PASSED (same-length overwrite + re-pinned mtime stays unseen)

behaviors.behavior: findWorkCompleted rebuilds the index when the log changes (appended run becomes visible)
behaviors.evidence: iterate-record.test.ts 'rebuilds the index when the log changes' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: found / absent / unavailable trichotomy preserved exactly vs the prior scan
Detail endpoint still re-validates roots point-in-time fresh (uncached)
behaviors.evidence: routes.documents.test.ts stale/root-no-longer-registered paths unchanged and green

behaviors.behavior: Mission-context response byte-identical for identical inputs across the refactor
behaviors.evidence: full mission-context suite (route + resolver, 33 files / 391) green pre- and post-refactor; F0.5 web smoke green
